info.title: DepSafe
info.description: Dependency safety and health analysis for .NET and npm projects. EU Cyber Resilience Act (CRA) compliance with SBOM/VEX generation, vulnerability scanning, and license compatibility.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: DepSafe - Dependency safety and compliance for .NET and npm projects

commands.description: Analyze package health for a project or solution

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: Path to project, solution, or directory to analyze [default: .]
